parameters.query: SELECT data, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(updated_at) AS updated_at_unix FROM service_health_snapshot WHERE id = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT name,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(status = 'up') / COUNT(*), 1) AS uptime_pct,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(status = 'up', latency_ms, NULL))) AS avg_latency_ms,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_count,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(MAX(IF(status != 'up', ts, NULL))) AS last_down_unix
FROM service_health_history
WHERE ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR
GROUP BY name

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_health_snapshot (
  id TINYINT UNSIGNED PRIMARY KEY,
  data JSON NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS service_health_history (
  id BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ts TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('up','auth','down') NOT NULL,
  latency_ms INT NULL,
  http_code SMALLINT NULL,
  error VARCHAR(80) NULL,
  INDEX idx_ts (ts),
  INDEX idx_name_ts (name, ts)
)
DELETE FROM service_health_history WHERE ts < NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ts) AS ts_unix, status, latency_ms, http_code, error
FROM service_health_history
WHERE name = '{{ $json.name_sql }}'
  AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL {{ $json.hours }} HOUR
ORDER BY ts ASC

SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(IF(ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND status='up', 1, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR), 0), 1) AS uptime_1h,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(IF(ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND status='up', 1, 0)) / NULLIF(SUM(ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR), 0), 1) AS uptime_24h,
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(IF(status='up', 1, 0)) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) AS uptime_7d,
  ROUND(AVG(IF(status='up' AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR, latency_ms, NULL))) AS avg_latency_24h_ms,
  COUNT(*) AS sample_count_7d
FROM service_health_history
WHERE name = '{{ $('Parse Name').first().json.name_sql }}'
  AND ts >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
